messages.content: You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
What can you help me with?
I can help you with a wide range of tasks including answering questions, writing content, analyzing documents, coding assistance, and much more. What would you like help with today?
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Explain how RAG works

RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) combines document retrieval with AI generation. When you ask a question, the system searches your uploaded documents for relevant content, then feeds that context to the AI model to generate an informed response. This allows me to answer questions based on your specific documents and knowledge base.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Upload a document

To upload a document, click the Docs button in the header. I support PDF, DOCX, TXT, and MD files. Once uploaded, I can answer questions about your documents using semantic search to find relevant information.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
What model do you use?
I use Groq's Llama 3.3 70B Versatile model for fast, high-quality responses. You can also switch to NovaAI's custom fine-tuned model for specialized tasks using the Settings panel.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
How do I switch models?
Click the Settings button in the header, then select your preferred model from the dropdown. Options include Groq Llama 3.3 70B (default, fast) and NovaAI Custom (fine-tuned for specialized tasks).
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Enable reasoning mode

Reasoning mode is available in Settings. When enabled, I'll think through complex problems step by step, showing my reasoning process. This helps with math, logic puzzles, and multi-step analysis tasks.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Export my chat

You can export your chat in two formats: Markdown (.md) for human-readable documentation, or JSON for data backup and analysis. Click the .md or JSON button in the header to download your current chat.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Use voice input
Click the microphone icon in the input box to start voice input. Speak clearly and I'll transcribe your speech to text. This is useful for hands-free interaction or when typing is inconvenient.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Save a prompt

To save a prompt, type your prompt in the input box, then click the Prompts button and 'Save Current'. Give it a name. Saved prompts can be quickly reused later by clicking 'Use' next to any saved prompt.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Delete a chat
Hover over any chat in the sidebar and click the trash icon. You'll see a confirmation dialog. Click Delete to permanently remove the chat and all its messages.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
What files can I upload?

I support PDF, DOCX, DOC, TXT, and MD files. Each document is automatically chunked and indexed with semantic embeddings for intelligent search. Larger documents are split into 500-character chunks with overlap.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
How does semantic search work?

When you upload documents, I create vector embeddings of the content. When you ask a question, I embed your query and find the most similar chunks from your documents using cosine similarity. The top matches are injected as context for my response.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Adjust temperature

Temperature controls response creativity. Lower values (0.1-0.3) produce more focused, deterministic responses. Higher values (0.7-1.0) produce more creative, varied responses. Adjust in Settings using the slider.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
What are embeddings?

Embeddings are numerical representations of text that capture semantic meaning. I use all-MiniLM-L6-v2 to create 384-dimensional vectors. Similar content has similar embeddings, enabling semantic search rather than keyword matching.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create an account
Currently NovaAI uses in-memory sessions without authentication. Your chats persist in browser memory. For persistent storage, future updates will include user accounts with login and registration.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write Python code

I can help you write Python code! Just describe what you want to accomplish and I'll provide working code with explanations. I can also debug existing code, optimize performance, or explain programming concepts.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Debug this error

Please paste the error message and the relevant code. I'll analyze the issue, explain what's causing it, and provide a fix with an explanation. Common issues include syntax errors, type mismatches, and logic bugs.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Explain this code
Paste the code you'd like explained. I'll break it down line by line, explain the logic, identify key patterns, and clarify any confusing parts. Great for learning or reviewing unfamiliar codebases.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write unit tests

I can write comprehensive unit tests for your code. Provide the function or module you want to test, and I'll create test cases covering edge cases, normal inputs, error conditions, and assertion examples using pytest or unittest.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Optimize this query

Share your SQL query and I'll analyze it for performance. I'll identify slow operations, suggest indexes, recommend query restructuring, and explain execution plans. Include table schemas for more specific optimization.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Design an API

I can help design RESTful APIs. Tell me about your requirements: what resources you need, operations, authentication, and I'll provide endpoint definitions, request/response schemas, status codes, and documentation examples.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write documentation
I can generate technical documentation. Describe your project, and I'll create README files, API docs, code comments, or user guides. Include details about features, installation, and usage examples.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Generate a regex
Describe the pattern you want to match (emails, dates, custom formats) and I'll generate a regex with explanation. I can also debug existing regex patterns or optimize them for performance.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create a JSON schema
Describe the data structure you need and I'll create a JSON Schema with type validation, required fields, constraints, and examples. Useful for API contracts and data validation.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write a bash script
Describe what automation task you need, and I'll write a bash script with error handling, logging, and comments. I can create deployment scripts, backup scripts, or data processing pipelines.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create a cron job
Tell me the command to run and how often (daily, hourly, specific times). I'll generate the cron expression with explanation and show you how to set it up on your system.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Compare technologies
I can compare frameworks, libraries, databases, or tools. Tell me what you're choosing between and your requirements, and I'll provide a feature comparison, pros/cons, and recommendations.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Explain microservices

Microservices is an architecture where applications are built as small, independent services. Each service handles a specific business function, communicates via APIs, and can be deployed independently. Benefits include scalability and team autonomy.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Design a database
I can help design database schemas. Describe your data entities, relationships, and access patterns. I'll provide table definitions, indexes, normalization analysis, and SQL schema code.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write a Dockerfile
Tell me your application type (Node.js, Python, Go, etc.) and requirements. I'll create an optimized Dockerfile with multi-stage builds, proper caching, and security best practices.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create docker-compose
Describe your services, databases, and networking needs. I'll generate a docker-compose.yml with proper service definitions, volumes, networks, and environment configuration.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Explain Kubernetes

Kubernetes (k8s) orchestrates containerized applications. It manages deployment, scaling, and failover. Key concepts: Pods (container groups), Services (networking), Deployments (replica management), and ConfigMaps (configuration).
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Set up CI/CD
I can help design CI/CD pipelines. Describe your tech stack and deployment target. I'll provide GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Jenkins pipeline configurations with build, test, and deploy stages.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Analyze logs
Paste your log output and I'll identify patterns, errors, warnings, and anomalies. I can extract key metrics, suggest alerts, and help debug issues from log data.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Monitor performance
I can help set up application monitoring. Describe your stack and I'll recommend tools (Prometheus, Grafana, APM solutions) and provide configuration for metrics, alerts, and dashboards.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Security best practices
I can review code or architecture for security. I check for injection vulnerabilities, authentication issues, data exposure, and provide remediation steps following OWASP guidelines.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write Terraform
Describe your infrastructure needs (AWS, GCP, Azure resources) and I'll generate Terraform configuration with proper resource definitions, variables, and outputs for infrastructure as code.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create GraphQL schema
Describe your data model and queries. I'll create a GraphQL schema with types, queries, mutations, and subscriptions following best practices for API design.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write a webhook handler
Tell me the webhook source (Stripe, GitHub, Slack) and I'll create a handler with signature verification, event parsing, and proper response codes for your chosen framework.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Rate limiting strategy
I can design rate limiting for your API. Describe your use case and I'll recommend token bucket, sliding window, or fixed window algorithms with implementation code and Redis/storage options.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write an email template
Describe the purpose (welcome, notification, marketing) and tone. I'll create a professional email template with subject line, body content, and placeholders for personalization.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Generate marketing copy
Tell me your product, target audience, and key benefits. I'll create compelling headlines, body copy, CTAs, and social proof for your marketing materials.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write blog post outline
Share your topic and target audience. I'll create a structured outline with introduction, key points, subheadings, examples, and conclusion to guide your writing process.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Summarize text
Paste the text you want summarized. I'll create a concise summary capturing key points, main arguments, and important details. Great for long articles, reports, or documentation.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Translate text
Provide the text and target language. I'll translate while preserving tone, context, and meaning. I support major languages including Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Japanese, and more.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Improve my writing
Paste your text and I'll improve clarity, grammar, and style. I can make it more concise, professional, or engaging depending on your audience and purpose.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Check grammar
Paste your text and I'll identify grammar errors, spelling mistakes, and punctuation issues. I'll provide corrections with explanations to help you improve your writing.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write a cover letter
Tell me the job title, company, and your relevant experience. I'll craft a professional cover letter highlighting your qualifications and enthusiasm for the position.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Prepare for interview
Tell me the job role and industry. I'll provide common interview questions, suggested answers, behavioral examples, and tips for making a great impression.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create a resume
Share your work history, skills, and target job. I'll create a professional resume with proper formatting, impactful bullet points, and ATS-friendly keywords.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Business plan outline
Describe your business idea and I'll create a structured business plan outline with executive summary, market analysis, competitive landscape, financial projections, and go-to-market strategy.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write a press release
Tell me about your announcement (product launch, partnership, milestone). I'll write a professional press release with headline, dateline, body, and boilerplate following AP style.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create social media post
Tell me the platform, topic, and tone. I'll create engaging social content with hashtags, mentions, and calls-to-action optimized for each platform's character limits and best practices.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Plan a meeting agenda
Share the meeting purpose, attendees, and duration. I'll create a structured agenda with time allocations, discussion topics, action items, and pre-meeting preparation notes.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write meeting notes
Provide the meeting details and discussion points. I'll format them into clear meeting notes with attendees, decisions made, action items with owners, and deadlines.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create a project plan
Describe your project scope, timeline, and resources. I'll create a project plan with phases, milestones, deliverables, dependencies, and risk mitigation strategies.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Calculate ROI
Provide the investment cost and expected returns (revenue, savings, or benefits). I'll calculate ROI, payback period, and break-even analysis with explanations.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Analyze data
Share your data (CSV, JSON, or described) and analysis goals. I'll identify patterns, trends, outliers, and provide insights with visualization suggestions.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create pivot table
Describe your data structure and what you want to analyze. I'll guide you through creating a pivot table with row/column groupings, aggregations, and filters.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Write SQL query
Describe the data you want to retrieve and your table structure. I'll write optimized SQL with proper joins, filters, and aggregations. Include your database type for syntax specifics.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Data visualization ideas
Tell me about your data and audience. I'll recommend visualization types (bar, line, scatter, map) and tools (matplotlib, D3, Tableau) with implementation guidance.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create a chart
Describe your data and chart type. I'll generate code for Python (matplotlib/plotly), JavaScript (Chart.js/D3), or configuration for your preferred visualization library.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Explain machine learning

Machine learning is teaching computers to learn from data. Key types: supervised (labeled data), unsupervised (pattern discovery), reinforcement (reward-based). Applications include prediction, classification, and clustering.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Train a model
Describe your dataset and prediction task. I'll guide you through data preparation, model selection (random forest, neural network, etc.), training, evaluation, and deployment steps.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Feature engineering
Tell me about your raw data and prediction goal. I'll suggest feature transformations, encodings, aggregations, and creation strategies to improve model performance.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Hyperparameter tuning
Share your model type and I'll explain key hyperparameters. I can suggest tuning strategies: grid search, random search, or Bayesian optimization with code examples.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Evaluate model performance
Tell me your model type and task. I'll explain relevant metrics: accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC-ROC for classification; MAE, RMSE, R² for regression. I'll interpret your results too.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Deploy ML model
I can help deploy your model. Options include REST API (FastAPI/Flask), containerization (Docker), serverless (AWS Lambda), or platforms (Hugging Face, SageMaker). I'll provide implementation code.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Build a chatbot
I can help build chatbots. Describe your use case (customer support, FAQ, conversational). I'll guide you through intent recognition, response generation, and platform integration options.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Image recognition basics

Image recognition uses CNNs (Convolutional Neural Networks) to detect patterns. Key concepts: convolution layers, pooling, feature maps. Popular architectures: ResNet, VGG, EfficientNet. Transfer learning accelerates development.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Natural language processing
NLP enables machines to understand text. Tasks include tokenization, named entity recognition, sentiment analysis, and text generation. Modern approaches use transformers like BERT and GPT.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create a web scraper
Tell me the website and data you need. I'll create a scraper using Python (BeautifulSoup, Scrapy) or JavaScript (Puppeteer). I'll handle pagination, rate limiting, and data extraction.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Build an API client
Share the API documentation or endpoints. I'll create a client library with authentication, error handling, retry logic, and typed responses in your preferred language.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Integrate with Stripe
I can help integrate Stripe payments. Describe your payment flow (one-time, subscription, marketplace). I'll provide code for checkout, webhooks, and customer management.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Send email notifications
I can help set up email sending. Options include transactional services (SendGrid, Mailgun), SMTP, or libraries (Nodemailer, Python email). I'll provide templates and integration code.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Set up authentication
I can implement authentication. Options include JWT, OAuth2, session-based, or third-party (Auth0, Firebase). I'll provide secure implementation with password hashing and token management.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Handle file uploads
I can implement file upload functionality. I'll cover frontend (multipart forms, drag-drop), backend (storage, validation, virus scanning), and cloud options (S3, Cloudinary).
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Create a search feature
Describe your data and search needs. I'll recommend approaches: full-text search (Elasticsearch), semantic search (embeddings), or hybrid. I'll provide implementation code and indexing strategies.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Build a recommendation system
I can help build recommendation engines. Approaches include collaborative filtering, content-based, or hybrid. I'll explain algorithms, similarity metrics, and provide implementation code.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Add real-time features
I can help add real-time functionality using WebSockets, Server-Sent Events, or Socket.io. Great for chat, notifications, live updates, and collaborative features.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Optimize images
I can help with image optimization: compression, format conversion (WebP, AVIF), lazy loading, responsive images, and CDN integration. I'll provide code and configuration examples.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Improve SEO

I can provide SEO recommendations: meta tags, structured data (Schema.org), sitemaps, robots.txt, page speed, mobile-friendliness, and content optimization. Share your site details for specific advice.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Add accessibility
I can help make your site accessible: ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, color contrast, alt text, semantic HTML, and screen reader support following WCAG guidelines.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Test my code
I can help with testing strategies. Share your code and I'll suggest unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests. I can write test cases using Jest, pytest, or Cypress.
You are NeuralAI, a helpful AI assistant.
Refactor code
Paste your code and I'll suggest improvements: cleaner structure, better naming, reduced complexity, design patterns, and performance optimizations while maintaining functionality.
